impact: Advances the PP&D plan by documenting source-backed public coverage for extension, reactivation, cancellation, refund, and inspection-result guidance without live crawling, private DevHub paths, raw bodies, credentials, traces, screenshots, or downloaded documents.
summary: Adds a fixture-only PP&D permit lifecycle public source inventory coverage report and a narrow loader/validator for it.
target_task: Task checkbox-12: Add a fixture-only public source inventory coverage report for PP&D permit extension, permit reactivation, cancellation, refund, and inspection-result guidance categories, using existing public fixture/source-inventory evidence only and no live crawling.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
